homepage.heroSubline: Transforming homes with quality and precision. Interior and exterior painting services you can trust.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Dedicated Service in Louisville
aboutText: Scott's Interior & Exterior started with a simple goal: to provide Louisville homeowners with painting services that exceed expectations. We've been painting homes across Jefferson County for over a decade, building a reputation for quality and reliability.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous preparation, premium materials, and skilled craftsmanship. We treat every home as if it were our own, ensuring flawless results and lasting beauty. We believe in clear communication, honest pricing, and a commitment to customer satisfaction.

We're proud to be a part of the Louisville community. From Old Louisville's historic homes to the modern developments in the East End, we're committed to enhancing the beauty and value of our city, one brushstroke at a time.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote and discover how Scott's Interior & Exterior can transform your Louisville home.

services.name: Interior Painting
services.shortDescription: Transform your living space with our expert interior painting services.
services.description:
Revitalize your Louisville home's interior with Scott's Interior & Exterior's professional painting services. We handle everything from surface preparation to the final coat, ensuring a flawless finish that enhances your living space. Our team understands the nuances of different paint types and application techniques, providing tailored solutions for every room in your home. We meticulously prepare surfaces, addressing imperfections and ensuring proper adhesion for a long-lasting, beautiful result.

Whether you're looking to update a single room or repaint your entire house, we'll work with you to choose the perfect colors and finishes to match your style and needs. We use only premium paints that are durable, washable, and resistant to fading, ensuring your investment lasts for years to come. We protect your furniture and belongings, and we leave your home clean and tidy after the job is complete.

Louisville homes, particularly older ones in neighborhoods like the Highlands and Old Louisville, often require special attention due to plaster walls and unique architectural details. We have the experience and expertise to handle these challenges, providing expert care and attention to detail that ensures a beautiful and lasting finish.
process: Step 4: Application of Paint (two coats for optimal coverage)
benefits: Enhance the beauty and value of your home
Create a fresh and inviting living space
Protect your walls from wear and tear
Increase your home's resale value

faq.question: How long does interior painting typically take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project, but we strive to complete most interior painting jobs within 2-5 days. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: Do I need to move my furniture?
faq.answer: We recommend removing small items and valuables. Our team will carefully cover and protect your larger furniture during the painting process.

faq.question: What type of paint do you use?
faq.answer: We use premium-quality paints from trusted brands like Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore, known for their durability, coverage, and color retention.

services.name: Exterior Painting
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your home with our professional exterior painting services.
services.description:
Scott's Interior & Exterior provides comprehensive exterior painting services to protect and enhance your Louisville home. We understand the unique challenges posed by Kentucky's climate, from hot, humid summers to cold, wet winters. Our team uses durable, weather-resistant paints and proven techniques to ensure a long-lasting finish that withstands the elements.

We begin with a thorough inspection of your home's exterior, identifying any areas of damage or deterioration. We then prepare the surfaces by power washing, scraping, and sanding to ensure proper adhesion. We prime all bare wood and metal surfaces to prevent rust and rot. We use high-quality paints specifically designed for exterior use, providing superior protection against fading, cracking, and peeling.

Whether your home is brick, siding, or wood, we have the expertise to handle any type of exterior surface. We'll work with you to choose the perfect colors and finishes to complement your home's architecture and style. Many homes in Louisville have limestone foundations that require proper sealing and painting. We understand these considerations and will make sure your house looks great and is protected for years to come.
process: Step 1: Power Washing and Surface Cleaning
Step 2: Scraping and Sanding Loose Paint
Step 3: Repairing Damaged Areas (wood rot, cracks)
Step 4: Priming Bare Wood and Metal
Step 5: Application of Exterior Paint (two coats)
benefits: Protect your home from the elements
Enhance your home's curb appeal
Increase your home's value
Prevent costly repairs down the road

faq.question: How often should I repaint my home's exterior?
faq.answer: Generally, you should repaint your home's exterior every 5-10 years, depending on the type of siding and the climate conditions. We can provide a more specific recommendation based on your home's condition.

faq.question: Do you offer color consultations for exterior painting?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer color consultations to help you choose the perfect colors for your home's exterior. We can provide samples and visualize different color schemes to help you make the best decision.

faq.question: What type of paint do you use for exterior painting?
faq.answer: We use high-quality exterior paints from trusted brands like Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore, specifically formulated to withstand the harsh weather conditions in Louisville.

services.name: Cabinet Painting
services.shortDescription: Give your kitchen a fresh, new look with our professional cabinet painting services.
services.description:
Transform your kitchen or bathroom without the expense of replacing your cabinets. Scott's Interior & Exterior offers professional cabinet painting services that can revitalize your space and give it a modern, updated look. We meticulously prepare your cabinets, ensuring a smooth and durable finish that will last for years to come.

Our process begins with removing all hardware and thoroughly cleaning the cabinet surfaces. We then sand and prime the cabinets to create a smooth, even base for the paint. We use high-quality paints specifically designed for cabinets, providing a durable and washable finish that resists chipping and scratching. We apply multiple coats of paint for optimal coverage and protection.

Whether you're looking to update your kitchen cabinets with a fresh coat of white paint or add a pop of color to your bathroom vanity, we can help you achieve your vision. We work with a variety of paint colors and finishes to match your style and needs. We also offer cabinet hardware replacement services to further enhance the look of your space. Many Louisville homes have older cabinets that can be refreshed rather than spending more for replacement.
process: Step 1: Removal of Hardware and Cleaning
Step 3: Application of Cabinet Paint (multiple coats)
benefits: Transform your kitchen or bathroom at a fraction of the cost of replacement
Update your space with a modern, stylish look
Increase the value of your home
Choose from a wide variety of colors and finishes

faq.question: How long does cabinet painting take?
faq.answer: Cabinet painting typically takes 3-5 days, depending on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide a more specific timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: Can you paint cabinets that have a laminate or veneer finish?
faq.answer: Yes, we can paint cabinets with laminate or veneer finishes. We use specialized primers and paints that are designed to adhere to these surfaces.

faq.question: Do I need to empty my cabinets before you start painting?
faq.answer: Yes, we ask that you empty your cabinets before we begin the painting process.

services.name: Deck Staining & Sealing
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your deck with our professional staining and sealing services.
services.description:
Extend the life of your Louisville deck with Scott's Interior & Exterior's professional staining and sealing services. Kentucky's weather can be harsh on decks, causing them to fade, crack, and rot. Our team uses high-quality stains and sealants to protect your deck from the elements and keep it looking its best for years to come.

We begin by thoroughly cleaning your deck to remove dirt, mildew, and old stain. We then sand any rough areas and repair any damaged boards. We apply a sealant to protect the wood from moisture and UV damage. We finish with a stain that enhances the natural beauty of the wood and provides additional protection.

Whether you're looking to refresh your existing deck or protect a new one, we can help you choose the perfect stain and sealant to meet your needs. We offer a variety of colors and finishes to match your style and preferences. Scott's Interior & Exterior extends the life of your deck with quality products and service.
process: Step 2: Sanding Rough Areas and Repairs
Step 4: Application of Deck Stain (multiple coats)
benefits: Protect your deck from the elements
Extend the life of your deck
Enhance the beauty of your outdoor space
Prevent costly repairs down the road

faq.question: How often should I stain and seal my deck?
faq.answer: Generally, you should stain and seal your deck every 2-3 years, depending on the type of wood and the weather conditions. We can provide a more specific recommendation based on your deck's condition.

faq.question: What type of stain and sealant do you use?
faq.answer: We use high-quality stains and sealants from trusted brands like Cabot and Thompson's WaterSeal, specifically formulated for exterior use.

faq.question: Do I need to remove my furniture from the deck before you start?
faq.answer: Yes, we ask that you remove your furniture from the deck before we begin the staining and sealing process.

services.name: Drywall Repair
services.shortDescription: Seamless drywall repairs to restore your walls to their original condition.
services.description:
From small holes to larger damage, Scott's Interior & Exterior provides expert drywall repair services to restore your walls to their original condition. We understand that damaged drywall can be unsightly and can also lead to further problems if left unaddressed. Our team has the skills and experience to seamlessly repair any type of drywall damage.

We begin by carefully assessing the damage and determining the best course of action. We then remove any loose or damaged drywall and patch the area with new drywall. We tape and mud the seams, ensuring a smooth, even finish. We sand the patched area and prime it for painting. Finally, we paint the repaired area to match the surrounding walls.

Whether you have a small nail hole or a large hole from water damage, we can help you restore your walls to their original condition. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and long-lasting repair. Many Louisville homes settle over time, leading to cracks in the drywall. We are experienced in handling these types of repairs.
benefits: Restore your walls to their original condition
Prevent further damage
Improve the appearance of your home
Increase the value of your home

faq.question: How long does drywall repair take?
faq.answer: Drywall repair typically takes 1-2 days, depending on the size and complexity of the repair. We'll provide a more specific timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: Do I need to move my furniture away from the area being repaired?
faq.answer: Yes, we ask that you move your furniture away from the area being repaired to protect it from dust and debris.

faq.question: Will the repaired area be noticeable after painting?
faq.answer: No, if done correctly, the repaired area should be seamless and unnoticeable after painting. We take great care to blend the repaired area with the surrounding walls.

services.name: Wallpaper Removal
services.shortDescription: Safely and effectively remove old wallpaper to prepare your walls for painting.
services.description:
Removing old wallpaper can be a challenging and time-consuming task. Scott's Interior & Exterior offers professional wallpaper removal services to safely and effectively remove old wallpaper and prepare your walls for painting. We have the tools and expertise to remove any type of wallpaper without damaging your walls.

We begin by scoring the wallpaper to allow the removal solution to penetrate. We then apply a wallpaper removal solution to loosen the adhesive. We carefully peel off the wallpaper, taking care not to damage the underlying drywall. We remove any remaining adhesive and smooth the walls. Finally, we prime the walls for painting.

Whether you have a single room or an entire house full of wallpaper, we can help you remove it quickly and efficiently. We use safe and effective methods to protect your walls and ensure a smooth, paint-ready surface. Many older homes in Louisville have layers of wallpaper that can be difficult to remove.
benefits: Save time and effort
Avoid damaging your walls
Prepare your walls for painting
Ensure a smooth, paint-ready surface

faq.question: How long does wallpaper removal take?
faq.answer: Wallpaper removal typically takes 1-3 days, depending on the size of the room and the type of wallpaper. We'll provide a more specific timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: Will wallpaper removal damage my walls?
faq.answer: We take great care to remove wallpaper without damaging your walls. However, in some cases, minor damage may occur. We will repair any damage before priming and painting.

faq.question: Do I need to do anything to prepare for wallpaper removal?
faq.answer: Yes, we ask that you remove any furniture and valuables from the room before we begin the wallpaper removal process.

serviceAreas.content:
Scott's Interior & Exterior is proud to provide professional painting services to the residents and businesses of Louisville, Kentucky. From historic homes in Old Louisville to modern condos downtown, we have the experience and expertise to handle any painting project, big or small. We understand the unique architectural styles and challenges that Louisville properties present, and we are committed to delivering exceptional results that enhance the beauty and value of your home or business.

Our team of skilled painters uses only the highest quality paints and materials to ensure a long-lasting and beautiful finish. We offer a wide range of services, including interior and exterior painting, cabinet refinishing, drywall repair, and pressure washing. We are fully licensed and insured, and we stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. Contact Scott's Interior & Exterior today for a free estimate and let us help you transform your Louisville property.
serviceAreas.localContext: Louisville is known for its vibrant arts scene, bourbon distilleries, and the Kentucky Derby. We take pride in contributing to the beauty of this dynamic city, one brushstroke at a time.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Scott's Interior & Exterior did an amazing job painting the interior of our home in St. Matthews. The crew was professional, efficient, and paid close attention to detail. Our walls look fantastic!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We hired Scott's to paint the exterior of our house in the Highlands. They did a great job prepping the surfaces and the paint job looks excellent. There were a couple of minor touch-ups needed, but they were quick to address them.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: Scott's team transformed our outdated kitchen cabinets with a fresh coat of paint. They look brand new! The whole process was smooth and professional.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Scott's Interior & Exterior did a fantastic job staining and sealing our deck. It looks beautiful and is now protected from the elements. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: We had some water damage in our basement, and Scott's team did a great job repairing the drywall. The repairs were seamless and you can't even tell there was any damage.

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: Scott's Interior & Exterior painted my living room and dining room. They were very professional, arrived on time, and did an excellent job. I would definitely hire them again.
